description: Style Note Add a touch of sizzle to any outfit with this exotic sling bag from pitaraa.  Choose from a variety of colours and styles for your next exciting night on the town Product Details Green sling bag that has a press buttoned closure Has one id card holder, seven card slots, one big insert pocket on the top, two insert pockets on the side with a zipped coin pocket One flap pocket with a press buttoned closure One adjustable and removable long strap for carrying ease One zipped pocket at the back Material and Care Glossy leatherette Size Dimensions: 20 cm x 15 cm
